body:
Marcus, thanks for the note — glad we could finally connect after the [SynBioBeta](conf/synbiobeta-2025) overlap last month. I've been thinking more about what you mentioned regarding the compressed timeline on the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) round, and I think there's a real case for us moving quickly here given where the market is heading on distributed energy infrastructure. Halfway has been tracking this space closely, and the team's traction on the interconnection queue problem is exactly the kind of wedge we find defensible at seed. I'd want to loop in my partner Dayo before we formalize anything, but I'm comfortable saying we're seriously interested. Can we get thirty minutes on the calendar this week to align on terms before the process tightens up?

— Amara
